content_fingerprint: deepseek v4 brings million token context within practical reach for agentic workflows hugging face has published a community guide covering deepseek v4 s extended context window highlighting what the model s million token capacity means for agents handling large codebases long documents and multi step reasoning hugging face published a community guide this week introducing deepseek v4 a model variant whose context window extends to one million tokens a figure that substantially exceeds the effective working memory of most deployed language models today the guide frames the advance primarily th
